case_title: WADE, MOIRE vs. EMERSON FLAG COMPANY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WADE, MOIRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMERSON FLAG COMPANY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP. $2,464.96 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,553.96
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WADE, MOIRE AS TO DEFENDANT EMERSON FLAG COMPANY, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP.
